jobs.name: 模拟盘综合检查 (每2小时 8-22点)

payload.message:
执行模拟盘综合检查（短线+长线合并）：

第一步：新闻风控
1. 用 web_fetch 抓取最新标题（maxChars=1500）：
   - https://www.aljazeera.com/news/
   - https://www.coindesk.com/
2. 执行 `cd /root/.openclaw/workspace/polymarket-tracker && python3 -c "from simulator.live_sim import load_portfolio; p=load_portfolio(); [print(f'{pos[\"market\"][:50]} | {pos.get(\"strategy\",\"?\")} | ${pos[\"size\"]}') for pos in p['open_positions']]"`
3. 对比新闻和持仓，发现重大利空标注 🔴 紧急

第二步：短线检查
`cd /root/.openclaw/workspace/polymarket-tracker && python3 -u simulator/live_sim.py short_check`

第三步：长线检查
`cd /root/.openclaw/workspace/polymarket-tracker && python3 -u simulator/live_sim.py check`

合并结果，有变动（平仓/开仓/紧急新闻）就用 message tool 发送到 telegram target=5689003327，无变动不发。

jobs.name: Session 自动清理+自愈 (每天3:00/15:00)

payload.message: 执行 `bash /root/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/session-cleanup.sh`。如果输出包含 ALERTS 部分，用 message tool 发送结果到 telegram target=5689003327。无告警不发。

jobs.name: 晚报 - 金融&区块链&政治军事新闻 (19:00)

payload.message:
生成晚报。执行 `cd /root/.openclaw/workspace && python3 -u scripts/enhanced_news.py`，再用 web_fetch 抓 https://www.aljazeera.com/news/ 和 https://github.com/trending 补充。整合为：💰行情 📊财经 🪙加密 🤖AI 🌍国际 💻GitHub(3-5个) 📅明日关注。用 message tool 发送到 telegram target=5689003327。格式：🧠超级大脑晚报|日期。源失败就跳过。

重要：行情速览部分必须包含 RATS 代币价格（从脚本输出的加密货币数据中提取），格式如：◈ RATS $0.0000xx (+x.xx%)。每次都要显示，不能遗漏。

jobs.name: 早报 - 金融&区块链&政治军事新闻

payload.message:
生成早报。执行 `cd /root/.openclaw/workspace && python3 -u scripts/enhanced_news.py`，再用 web_fetch 抓 https://www.aljazeera.com/news/ 和 https://github.com/trending 补充。整合为：💰行情 📊财经 🪙加密 🤖AI 🌍国际 💻GitHub(3-5个) 📅今日关注。用 message tool 发送到 telegram target=5689003327。格式：🧠超级大脑早报|日期。源失败就跳过。

重要：行情速览部分必须包含 RATS 代币价格（从脚本输出的加密货币数据中提取），格式如：◈ RATS $0.0000xx (+x.xx%)。每次都要显示，不能遗漏。

生成模拟盘日报（只读取状态，不做交易）：

执行 `cd /root/.openclaw/workspace/polymarket-tracker && python3 -c "
import json
from collections import defaultdict
with open('data/sim_portfolio.json') as f:
    p = json.load(f)
opens = p.get('open_positions', [])
closed = p.get('closed_positions', [])
wins = [c for c in closed if c.get('realized_pnl', c.get('pnl', 0)) > 0]
losses = [c for c in closed if c.get('realized_pnl', c.get('pnl', 0)) < 0]
total_win = sum(c.get('realized_pnl', c.get('pnl', 0)) for c in wins)
total_loss = sum(c.get('realized_pnl', c.get('pnl', 0)) for c in losses)
unrealized = sum(pos.get('unrealized_pnl', 0) for pos in opens)
invested = sum(pos.get('size', 0) for pos in opens)
total_assets = p['balance'] + invested + unrealized
win_rate = len(wins) / len(closed) * 100 if closed else 0
short_open = [o for o in opens if o.get('strategy') == 'short_term']
long_open = [o for o in opens if o.get('strategy') != 'short_term']
print(f'balance:{p[\"balance\"]:.2f}')
print(f'invested:{invested:.2f}')
print(f'unrealized:{unrealized:+.2f}')
print(f'total:{total_assets:.2f}')
print(f'trades:{len(closed)}')
print(f'winrate:{win_rate:.1f}')
print(f'positions:{len(opens)} (short:{len(short_open)} long:{len(long_open)})')
for pos in opens:
    pnl = pos.get('unrealized_pnl', 0)
    icon = '✅' if pnl > 0 else '❌' if pnl < -1 else '⬜'
    print(f'{icon} {pos[\"market\"][:45]} | {pos.get(\"outcome\",\"?\")[:4]} | \${pos[\"size\"]} | {pnl:+.2f}')
"

用以上输出生成简洁日报，用 message tool 发送到 telegram target=5689003327。格式：🧠 模拟盘日报 | 日期。包含：总资产、余额、胜率、持仓明细。
